positive.text: It is really great and helpful because it emphasis on many things like technical depth, behavourial, verbal and non-verbal etc.
the product is great,especially the ai interview

negative.text: Because I myself was not that much prepared for the interview practice
The platform is very hard to navigate for a new user. Also the AI in the interviews is not upto the mark and has bugs
because I feel like there is a lack of human touch when preparing with ai and lack of conciousness

In my case I just gave one behavioral interview and somehow it reached the interview limit (which is 2 interviews) even though i had just given one , other than that, the ai took too long to process my answer and was not able to provide the next question
resume uploading and rate limits dont work properly
